summary: Good audience recording captures an epic 1985 second set with a top‑notch China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider.
review: Both reviewers rate the show highly, praising its vibe and strong second‑set performance. The tape is noted as a solid audience source that sounds clear enough to enjoy, with the China‑Rider sequence highlighted as a standout moment. Overall the concert delivers great sets and an unforgettable atmosphere.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are positive (4 stars) and emphasize strong performance and decent audio quality; with only two reviews confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review mentions a "good recording for aud" and that it is well worth the download, indicating clear enough sound despite being an audience tape.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe great sets and an epic vibe, suggesting a well‑flowing concert with a particularly strong second set.
